== Notes for [[Item:Q78134|Q78134]] ==

ID: I5394Ar54a

Name: Areobindus -

Given Name: Areobindus

Surname: -

Sex: M

Note:

SOURCES:

- eMahlerL98My02

-

PKD UAD-5394Ar54a 2003My23

Copyright (c) 2009 Paul K Davis [paulkdavis@@earthlink.net] Fremont CA

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Dagalaifus -

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=pkd&id=I5394Ar54a

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q1282468 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000000700945532
